title: Blue Canyon Diamond Digital Display Bathroom Scales| Measure Body, Luggage Weight| Maintain Fitness| kg/lb Unit Conversion| 150kg Max Capacity| High-Precision Sensors| Accurate Bathroom Scale (Black)
features: 【PRECISE WEIGHT MEASUREMENT】: Blue Canyon Bathroom scales are equipped with 4 latest-version high-precision gauge sensors, graduation of 0.1kg/0.2 lbs. A quad stability pad suspension provides optimal stability and traction during usage.

【SLEEK, SLIM DESIGN】: Simple, compact, and modern design of these Scales fits right in with the decor of any Bathroom space. Perfect for popping in the drawer to save space! Our Compact Bathroom Scales feature auto on/off technology and an ultra-thin and lightweight designs to quickly access and carry with you.

【USER-FRIENDLY】: The quick Unit Button converts between different units of measurement (lb, kg) and displays results on an easy-to-read LCD screen. These Weight Scales are for better tracking intake, weight loss and postage.
【EASY TO CLEAN】: Our weighing scale can be easily wiped with a damp cloth, leaving no traces of residues and water stains, leaving no fingerprints, and easier to keep clean and maintain.

【 MAXIMUM CAPACITY 】: Our Digital Weighing Scale can weigh up to a maximum of 150kg at a time with a multiple unit converter. The High precision sensors inside the scale ensure that every measurement is accurately measured to 0.1kg/0.2lbs. It requires 2 x CR2032 batteries to power up.
description: Product Description Step-On technology allows you to simply step on the scale and get your weights. No more tapping to activate the scale! Our Bathroom scales are designed with tempered glass, which is durable and has a waterproof surface. Built-in high-precision Gauge sensors for more accurate measurement. To let you know even the slightest difference in your weight.
